---
title: "Gusty Upgrade Display Issue"
date: 2007-10-22
forum: Multimedia &amp; Video
---

### Post by wormser on 2007-10-22
My upgrade to Gusty did not go well.  My display is like a slow VNC session.  Also, my fan kicks into high and it seems my CPU is kicked into high gear.  Using Top my CPU% for Xgl is above 70%.  I am considering just doing a clean install of Gusty.  Here are some details.

> 01:00.0 VGA compatible controller: ATI Technologies Inc M22 [Mobility Radeon X300]

> # /etc/X11/xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)

### Post by wormser on 2007-10-22
This issue seems to be more than just a video issue.  I found a thread that lead to a bug related to my issue. I have to do a clean install.

Consider this thread resolved because it is a bug and the only fix is a clean install at this time.

---
